title: Apply Cluster Upgrade
content:
# Apply Cluster Upgrade

Initiates available cluster upgrades; requires cluster to be online and ready.

## Endpoint

`GET /orchestration/clusters/{cluster_name}/edge-apps/version/apply`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.orchestration.applyOrchestrationClustersEdgeAppsVersion()
print(response)

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: Cluster key `name` to initiate upgrades. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

200.description: Upgrade apply trigger sent to the cluster
